thesis: Telecom-equipment leader with the strongest momentum in the universe and rising analyst revisions; a genuine uptrend worth owning but capped because an 8+ momentum z is a late-stage move prone to mean-reversion.
falsification: A sharp momentum reversal (multi-week drawdown deeper than midcap peers) or revisions rolling over from rising to falling within 1-2 months.

thesis: Injectables franchise with rising analyst revisions and improving price momentum; a structural pharma compounder re-rating as estimates climb.
falsification: Revisions turn falling or a regulatory/USFDA setback breaks the earnings-estimate uptrend.

thesis: Explosives and defence supplier with rising revisions and a multi-year order-led growth runway; momentum confirms the fundamental upgrade cycle.
falsification: Order-flow disappointment or falling revisions; momentum z dropping below peers.

thesis: Diversified materials/paints story with rising analyst revisions; a quality holding to anchor the materials sleeve.
falsification: Paints-segment margin disappointment or revisions turning falling.

thesis: Zinc producer with rising revisions and firm momentum; commodity cycle and dividend support the cyclical thesis.
falsification: Zinc price rollover or revisions turning falling; momentum fading below peers.
